ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who generated the invoice */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription associated with the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Billing cycle (e.g., Monthly, Annual) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Pending, Paid, Overdue) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription plan the customer is using */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan (e.g., Individual, Family, Student) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the subscription plan */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the subscription plan (e.g., Monthly, Annual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subscription plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_lines" (
  "invoice_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice line item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice this line item belongs to */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track streamed */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit for the track */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the track streamed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice line item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice line item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_lines_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_lines_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "album" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice that was paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who streamed the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track that was streamed */,
  "stream_date" TEXT /* Date the track was streamed */,
  "stream_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the stream in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promo_codes" (
  "promo_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional code */,
  "code" TEXT /* Promotional code string */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount amount or percentage */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the promotional code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotional code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotional code was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice that was refunded */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was issued */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the refund */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the refund was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the refund was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refunds_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
